title: BSF Retreat 2026
text:
Hello there 👋




…this is about BSF Leaders Retreat 2026…




…if you have already RSVP-ed…




Well done 🤩🤩🤩













…if you haven’t yet, please RSVP ASAP on Whatsapp!!!




…now for the exciting bit…




For more details on the retreat, click on this handsome lad 👇

title: ⚠️⚠️⚠️ Under Construction ⚠️⚠️⚠️
text:
⚠️⚠️⚠️ Under Construction ⚠️⚠️⚠️
Just kidding, we have no detail yet, other than the fact it’s on 17-19 July.
You can expedite this by encouraging your fellow BSF leaders to RSVP to the event.
In the meanwhile, please enjoy the following representation of the AL brain hard at work planning for retreat:
